_comment: Tier-2 for kratos contact#: catalog lists ALMFrictionlessMortarContact / etc. as condition names. All four catalog-listed BASE names fail CreateNewCondition with 'is not registered'. Real names need both 'Condition' suffix AND shape (2D2N / 3D3N / 3D4N / etc.). Verified empirically 2026-06-01 against KratosContactStructuralMechanicsApplication 10.4.2. The CSMA application was missing from .venv until pip installed during this probe.
